title: onobrychis degenii
intro: Onobrychis degenii, also known as Degen's bird's-foot or mountain clover, is a plant species in the pea family (Fabaceae). It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Onobrychis degenii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Onobrychis degenii can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
